title: Indestructible Enchantment
description: Adds an enchantment to make items unable to be destroyed by lava, explosions, etc.
body:
**Never lose your items again!**

---

## Directions:
- Craft the enchantment with a book and echo shards
- Combine it with any supported item in an anvil
- The enchanted item can no longer despawn or be destroyed
- Just put the item in a grindstone if you change your mind

## Crafting Recipe:

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2e418f3a47a7d9b4a27068f5bbe9da3e860e5ca.png)

*Note: after adding to your world, the game will inform you that the datapack is using experimental features. While custom enchantments are relatively low-risk changes, you are using this datapack at your own risk! Please back up your worlds regularly.
